/usr/bin/aarch64-linux-gnu-g++ --sysroot=/home/donii/sysroots/pi5 -O3 -DNDEBUG -L/home/donii/sysroots/pi5/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu -Wl,-rpath-link,/home/donii/sysroots/pi5/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu -L/home/donii/sysroots/pi5/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu -Wl,-rpath-link,/home/donii/sysroots/pi5/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu -L/home/donii/sysroots/pi5/usr/local/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu -Wl,-rpath-link,/home/donii/sysroots/pi5/usr/local/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu -L/home/donii/sysroots/pi5/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu -Wl,-rpath-link,/home/donii/sysroots/pi5/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu -L/home/donii/sysroots/pi5/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu -Wl,-rpath-link,/home/donii/sysroots/pi5/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu -L/home/donii/sysroots/pi5/usr/local/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu -Wl,-rpath-link,/home/donii/sysroots/pi5/usr/local/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu CMakeFiles/apertar-core.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/apertar-core.dir/src/ApertarCoreApp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/apertar-core.dir/src/camera/CameraController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/apertar-core.dir/src/cdng/CdngEncoder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/apertar-core.dir/src/ipc/ControlProtocol.cpp.o CMakeFiles/apertar-core.dir/src/ipc/ControlServer.cpp.o -o apertar-core  /home/donii/sysroots/pi5/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libcamera.so /home/donii/sysroots/pi5/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libcamera-base.so
